intro: Koanophyllon flavidulum, also known as yellow leaf-spike, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of Koanophyllon flavidulum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic properties.
